title: Arbitrators, Mediators, and Conciliators
description: Facilitate negotiation and conflict resolution through dialogue. Resolve conflicts outside of the court system by mutual consent of parties involved.

tasks.text: Prepare written opinions or decisions regarding cases.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Apply relevant laws, regulations, policies, or precedents to reach conclusions.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Conduct hearings to obtain information or evidence relative to disposition of claims.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Determine extent of liability according to evidence, laws, or administrative or judicial precedents.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Rule on exceptions, motions, or admissibility of evidence.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Confer with disputants to clarify issues, identify underlying concerns, and develop an understanding of their respective needs and interests.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Use mediation techniques to facilitate communication between disputants, to further parties' understanding of different perspectives, and to guide parties toward mutual agreement.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Conduct initial meetings with disputants to outline the arbitration process, settle procedural matters, such as fees, or determine details, such as witness numbers or time requirements.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Evaluate information from documents, such as claim applications, birth or death certificates, or physician or employer records.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Research laws, regulations, policies, or precedent decisions to prepare for hearings.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Issue subpoenas or administer oaths to prepare for formal hearings.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Set up appointments for parties to meet for mediation.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Recommend acceptance or rejection of compromise settlement offers.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare settlement agreements for disputants to sign.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Authorize payment of valid claims.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Interview claimants, agents, or witnesses to obtain information about disputed issues.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Conduct studies of appeals procedures to ensure adherence to legal requirements or to facilitate disposition of cases.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Specialize in the negotiation and resolution of environmental conflicts involving issues such as natural resource allocation or regional development planning.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Organize or deliver public presentations about mediation to organizations, such as community agencies or schools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Participate in court proceedings.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
